content:
@everyone 
For security and sensitivity reasons, I've decided to make my coordination repository **Private** instead of **Public**.

This means that **only GitHub accounts that have been confirmed as Collaborators will be able to see the repository.** Other than that, this shouldn't affect anything. I've reached out to send an invite to all of the accounts I can find, but some that didn't respond have expired.

## [If you see an Error 404 when you click this link,](https://github.com/omnichromia/morimens-volunteer-coordination) post in <#1416615133479960647> and let me know your GitHub account name, and I'll send you an invite. Anyone at this point that is active in this project should do this right now so that we don't run into issues later on!
